Name: Brahm Centre
Tagline: rof Angie Chew 11:00 am Details This retreat will support your journey to navigate the pain of loss towards finding a path towards peace and acceptance.
About: Brahm Centre is a registered mental health charity dedicated to promoting happier and healthier living through holistic programs. We empower indivduals to create their own happiness.
Philosophy: We have a care management team supported by trained volunteers. Working with the Agency for Integrated Care, the Ministry of Health and healthcare and educational institutions, we support the community through health education, case management, counselling services and outreach.
Outcomes: Brahm Centre enhances mental well-being and resilience through mindfulness and wellness programs, fostering a supportive community.
Admissions: Membership is open to all; interested individuals can register for programs via the website or contact the centre directly.
Quote: Empower your mind and embrace wellness to craft the happiness you deserve each day.

Performance.Academic Integration: At Brahm Centre, our program is thoughtfully designed to empower seniors to live fulfilling and vibrant lives. The program focuses on five essential domains, each contributing to overall well-being.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Brahm Centre's instructors are certified in mindfulness-based stress reduction (MBSR) and have extensive experience in mental health care. They employ evidence-based approaches to facilitate effective learning and personal growth.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Brahm Centre offers comprehensive counselling services and mindfulness programs to enhance emotional resilience and mental well-being. A supportive community environment is fostered through regular workshops and peer support groups.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Participants of Brahm Centre's programs often report improved mental clarity and reduced stress, contributing to better academic and professional performance. Many successfully integrate mindfulness practices into their daily routines, enhancing overall life satisfaction.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Brahm Centre features dedicated mindfulness studios equipped with audio-visual aids for immersive learning experiences. The centre also provides comfortable counselling rooms to ensure privacy and a conducive environment for personal development.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Brahm Centre conducts regular feedback sessions and progress assessments to ensure program effectiveness and participant satisfaction. Stakeholders receive detailed reports on individual and group outcomes to maintain transparency and accountability.
